name: agent-orchestrator-hook-spike
description: Unit 4.5 spike: dumps SessionStart hook env + stdin so we can see what Claude Code exposes to hooks under direct `claude` vs `agency claude --enable-auto-mode`. Not part of the shipped plugin; load via `claude --plugin-dir <path>/agent-orchestrator/spikes` from the launch commands in launcher-compat-findings.md.
author: agent-orchestrator
